summary: WhenSection duration free-type+clamp(5-480) correct: draft/effect resync sound, guard+onBlur clamp safe, revert-to-dur not a magic default. No BLOCK/WARN. End-time path (L287, pre-existing) bypasses clamp; brain fact #120 (720) contested vs schema 480.

findings.claim: useState(String(dur)) + useEffect(...,[dur]) draft resync is correct, no infinite loop or stale closure
findings.evidence: Dep array [dur] complete; effect writes durDraft which is not a dep so cannot re-trigger; React bails on unchanged value; resyncs on External End-time->dur (L287) and snapshot revert (TaskEditForm L323); hooks before any early return

findings.claim: onChange live-commit guard !isNaN && String(n)===raw && range is conservative and safe
findings.evidence: '05','+5','1e3','-',whitespace all fail String(n)===raw and defer to onBlur instead of mis-committing; parseInt(raw,10) radix present

findings.claim: onBlur 'if(isNaN(n)) n=dur' reverts to last-committed value, sound nearest-bound clamp, not an unapproved fallback
findings.evidence: dur is the genuine current committed number not a magic constant; Math.min(MAX,Math.max(MIN,n)) gives nearest bound; rare dur==='' coerces to safe in-range 5

findings.claim: New draft/guard/clamp/Enter-blur branches change the testable surface
findings.evidence: Existing WhenSection*.test.jsx suite covers this component; new branches: in-range live commit, out-of-range deferral, empty->revert, clamp-to-bound, End-time resync
findings.fix: REFER->telly to confirm new branches covered

findings.claim: Duration (min) label + amber range hint span are visual/branding choices
Pre-existing End-time->dur path can set dur outside [5,480], bypassing the new clamp and failing backend zod on save
findings.evidence: onDurChange(endMins - startMins) is untouched by this diff; a 3-min or 600-min span writes dur out of range; only one of two dur-writing inputs is range-enforced
findings.fix: optional follow-up backlog item to clamp End-time-derived dur; out of this leg's scope

findings.claim: Brain fact #120 (duration cap 720) is stale vs authoritative zod max(480); code correctly follows 480
findings.evidence: task.schema.js:17 dur z.number().int().min(5).max(480); config.schema.js:22 corroborates 480; fact #120 score 0.34 file-derived
findings.fix: REFER->scooter reconcile (supersede 720 fact); no code change

refers.why: confirm new draft/guard/clamp/Enter-blur branches are covered in WhenSection*.test.jsx
visual/UX of 'Duration (min)' label + amber range hint span
reconcile contested brain fact #120 (720) vs authoritative schema max(480)
